snps.effect_template: HLA-C*06:02 tag SNP. Strongest genetic risk factor for plaque psoriasis.
Second HLA-C tag SNP for psoriasis risk. Strong effect.
IL12B interleukin 12B. T cell differentiation and Th1 response in psoriasis.
IL23R interleukin 23 receptor protective variant. IL-23 signaling in psoriasis pathogenesis.
TNFAIP3 TNF-alpha induced protein 3. NF-kappa B inhibition in immune regulation.
LCE3B/3C late cornified envelope proteins. Skin barrier function in psoriasis.
TRAF3IP2 TNF receptor associated factor 3 interacting protein 2. NF-kappa B pathway involvement.

recommendation_template: Manage known triggers: stress, skin injury, infections. Maintain healthy weight (obesity worsens psoriasis). Early treatment with a dermatologist can prevent progression.

studies.title: A large-scale genetic association study confirms IL12B and leads to the identification of IL23R as psoriasis-risk genes
studies.finding: HLA-C region (rs10484554) confers OR=4.66 for psoriasis

studies.title: Genome-wide meta-analysis of psoriasis
studies.finding: Identified multiple psoriasis susceptibility loci including IL12B, IL23R, TNFAIP3, LCE3B/3C, and TRAF3IP2
